## Multi-Currency Payouts are here

Send payouts to your partners and suppliers in their local currency.

- **25+ currencies** — USD, EUR, GBP, MYR, PHP, and more
- **Same-day processing** — for supported corridors
- **Competitive FX rates** — no hidden markups

---

## How it works

- Select payout recipients from your dashboard
- Choose the currency and amount
- Confirm and track in real-time

[Try Multi-Currency Payouts](https://www.hitpayapp.com/payouts){.cta}
